title: Will's One Piece Swords and More
description: This is a texture pack made by my friend will that changes the texture of some swords to one piece swords and it also changes other tools but not to one piece just the swords are for one piece.
body:
This is a texture pack made by my friend Will that changes the texture of some swords to one-piece swords, and it also changes other tools, but not to one-piece textures; just the swords are for one piece.

[Bedrock Download](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1-DjUafCJZA5XlN40zsZ4cszC-bVOJaPx/view?usp=sharing)

Credit:
abdouahabch7: [Forged Fury: Infernal Tools](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/molten-tools)

If one of these textures is yours, please contact me at mr.white15851@gmail.com.
